gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot has updated the repository's front page with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page up-to-date with the latest community activity and project news.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot updating a giant digital billboard or scroll with new pictures of apps, while Polly the bee watches.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head updating a large digital notice board with new pixelated pictures. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
